seo.title: Book Training Session
seo.description: Book and manage your training sessions.

modal.time_error: Start time must be earlier than end time
modal.busy_times: ⏳ Trainer is busy at these times:
modal.free_times: ✅ Trainer is free on this day

page.desc: Proactively manage your training time. The schedule will automatically sync with your Personal Trainer.
page.no_bookings_title: You haven't booked any sessions yet
page.no_bookings_desc: Click "Add New Schedule" to set up your training times.
page.no_trainer_error: You have not been assigned a Personal Trainer yet.
page.trainer_message: This schedule was created by your Trainer. Please contact them directly if you need changes.
page.edit_limit_error: You have run out of edit attempts for this schedule today.
page.confirm_edit_msg: Note: You can only edit each schedule once per day. Your schedule cannot be deleted. Are you sure you want to change it now?
page.confirm_register_msg: Your training schedule will be sent directly to your Trainer. Note: You can edit but CANNOT DELETE this schedule. Are you sure you want to book?
